mnemonics.title: HDFS Components
mnemonics.content: NameNode is the BRAIN (Metadata), DataNodes are MUSCLES (Storage), Client is MOUTH (Requests)

mnemonics.title: MapReduce Phases
mnemonics.content: MAPS-R: Mapper → Partitioner → Shuffle → Sort → Reducer

visualTips.visualization: Imagine data blocks flowing through pipes: Client → NameNode (map) → DataNodes (storage) → Mappers (processing) → Reducers (aggregation)

analogies.analogy: Like making photocopies of important documents and storing them in different office cabinets
Similar to dividing a large math problem among students (mappers) and combining their answers (reducers)
